Use whenever a test needs a selector and when healing selector-category failures." --- # Selector Extraction ## Priority order 1. `data-testid="..."` 2. `getByRole(...)` / `aria-label="..."` 3. stable, non-generated `id="..."` 4. `getByText(...)` 5. ⚠️ class names — last resort, expect churn 6. ❌ brittle XPath / deep CSS chains — never ## Procedur...read_file({"path":".github/skills/test-traceability/SKILL.md"})--- name: test-traceability description: "Ensures every test traces to a source file/line, a business rule (BR-###) when applicable, and a docs/actualtestcases.csv row. Now I'll produce the two missing outputs: `specs/selectors.md` and `specs/master-test-plan.md`. write_file({"path":"projects/example-good/specs/selectors.md","content":"# Selector Map — example-good\n\n> Generated by: Test Planner\n> Source of truth: `specs/project-memory.md` §5 + static analysis of `https://example.com` (static HTML)\n> Confirmation method: previously run `tests/homepage.spec.ts` (all 6 tests PASSED)\n\n## Priority tier key\n1. `data-testid=\"...\"` — highest\n2. `getByRole(...)` / `aria-label=\"...\"`\n3. stable `id=\"...\"`\n4. `getByText(...)`\n5. class names — last resort\n6. ❌ brittle XPath / deep CSS chains — never\n\n---\n\n## Homepage (`/`)\n\n| Screen | Element | Selector | Priority tier | Confirmed |\n|----------|--------------------------|---------------------------------------------------|------------------------|-----------|\n| Homepage | Page `

` heading | `h1` | 3 — stable tag (single `h1` on page) | ✅ Yes |\n| Homepage | First body paragraph | `page.locator('p').first()` | 3 — stable tag (first `

`) | ✅ Yes |\n| Homepage | \"Learn more\" hyperlink | `page.getByRole('link', { name: 'Learn more' })` | 2 — ARIA role + name | ✅ Yes |\n\n### Notes\n- `https://example.com` is a static HTML page with no `data-testid` or `aria-label` attributes — tier 1 is unavailable.\n- The `h1` selector resolves to exactly one element (verified in TC-002).\n- `p.first()` resolves to exactly one element — the page has a single `

` block containing both sentences (TC-003/TC-004).\n- `getByRole('link', { name: 'Learn more' })` resolves to exactly one element (TC-005/TC-006).\n- No selector gaps; all required elements are reachable at the highest tier available for this static page.\n\n---\n\n## Deferred / Not applicable\n| Element | Reason |\n|---------|--------|\n| Login form fields | No authentication flow — page is public |\n| Navigation menu | No nav elements on this page |\n"})Wrote 1892 bytes to projects/example-good/specs/selectors.md
